columns.name: asset_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the asset associated with the misconfiguration

columns.name: config_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the configuration associated with the misconfiguration

columns.name: severity
columns.description: Severity level of the misconfiguration (e.g., low, medium, high)

columns.name: discovered_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the misconfiguration was discovered

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the misconfiguration was last updated

grain: Each row represents a unique misconfiguration finding associated with a specific asset.
data_quality_concerns: asset_id and config_id are strings and may not be unique if not properly managed.
Severity and category fields may contain inconsistent values if not standardized.
recommended_transformations: Standardize severity and category values to a predefined set of options.
Implement checks to ensure asset_id and config_id combinations are unique.
